title: Lucid Group, Inc. (LCID) Stock Forecast & Price Prediction 2026–2030
text: CoinCodex projects Lucid stock price scenarios extending to 2030. Base case scenario forecasts stock reaching $5.42 average by 2030, assuming profitability achieved by 2028. Bull case scenario projects $15+ if robotaxi becomes significant revenue contributor. Bear case projects $1-3 if company faces further capital raises and execution challenges. The 2030 timeline reflects view that profitability remains years away. The wide range of outcomes reflects fundamental uncertainty about whether business model can achieve sustainable profitability. Analysis emphasizes that 2026-2027 results will be critical in determining which scenario materializes.
